cases.name: simple_parameterized_lookup
cases.sql: SELECT "t0"."id" AS "id", "t0"."companyID" AS "companyID", "t0"."departmentID" AS "departmentID", "t0"."name" AS "name", "t0"."email" AS "email", "t0"."score" AS "score", "t0"."isActive" AS "isActive", "t0"."payload" AS "payload" FROM "benchmark_person" AS "t0" WHERE ("t0"."id" == :personID)

cases.name: representative_multi_join_read
cases.sql: SELECT "t0"."id" AS "personID", "t0"."name" AS "personName", "t1"."name" AS "departmentName", "t2"."name" AS "companyName", "t0"."score" AS "score", "t0"."isActive" AS "isActive" FROM "benchmark_person" AS "t0" INNER JOIN "benchmark_department" AS "t1" ON ("t1"."id" == "t0"."departmentID") INNER JOIN "benchmark_company" AS "t2" ON ("t2"."id" == "t1"."companyID") WHERE (("t2"."id" == :companyID) AND ("t0"."score" >= :minimumScore)) ORDER BY "t0"."score" DESC LIMIT 32
